productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Black Flat Casual Shoes
description: This is a Classic Mary Jane shoe from catwalk that has a blunt toe cup and an elasticated and adjustable velcro closure to offer a perfect Fit. Mary Jane's need not be just a summer indulgence with their sweet, girly style - this pair adds a party girl glam with its shiny synthetic leather overlay. Wear it with form fitting denims or short skirts for a house party to add instant glitz to your ensemble and be charmed out of your haughty stilettos.UpperSynthetic leather upper with hide overlaysElasticated velcro closure for a customised fitSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with textured grooves and a dotted pattern grooves with the outsole reinforced on the heel cup for maximum durabilityShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
